steps.title: Look for a zero count
steps.content: The phrase "did not observe even one" means the graph must show zero individuals for a species at the stated time. The lined rockskipper has zero individuals in April and July 2001.

steps.title: Reject nonzero examples
steps.content: Choice A is wrong because the barred flagtail appears in October. Choice B is wrong because combtooth blennies appear in January, and choice C is wrong because barred flagtails appear in January. The remaining choice names the species and months where the count is zero. The answer is D.
